task_completion.description: Verify the agent has accessed the SciNote application.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the SciNote web interface, indicating the agent has successfully logged in.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent navigated to the Protocol Repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the 'Protocols' or 'Protocol Repository' page within the SciNote application.

task_completion.description: Verify the agent initiated the creation of a new protocol.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show a 'New Protocol' modal, form, or page opened by the agent.

task_completion.description: Verify the correct protocol name was entered.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show the exact text 'Western Blot Analysis v2' typed into the protocol name input field.

task_completion.description: Verify the protocol was successfully created and appears in the repository.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Screenshots show 'Western Blot Analysis v2' listed as an existing protocol in the repository list or displayed on its own newly created protocol overview page.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the graphical user interface to create the protocol.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with the SciNote web interface in a browser, not terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify the agent interacted with the actual SciNote web application.
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser address bar shows a valid SciNote URL (e.g., localhost or the appropriate domain) and not a local text file or mock interface.

integrity.description: Verify the protocol was genuinely created rather than visually faked.
integrity.visual_evidence: The screenshots show a logical progression of creating the protocol (opening the form, typing the name, saving) rather than just a sudden appearance of the text via browser developer tools.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The expected protocol name to be created is exactly 'Western Blot Analysis v2'.
